key.query: official The Glenlivet Caribbean Reserve Rum Barrel Selection

emittedEvidence.query: official The Glenlivet Caribbean Reserve Rum Barrel Selection
emittedEvidence.summary:
**Confirmed identity:** **The Glenlivet Caribbean Reserve** — often shown on labels/subtitles as **“Rum Barrel Selection”** or described as a whisky “selectively finished in Caribbean rum casks/barrels.” It is an **official Glenlivet single malt Scotch whisky release**, not an independent bottling. ([theglenlivet.com](https://www.theglenlivet.com/en-us/whisky/caribbean-reserve-single-malt-scotch/?utm_source=openai))

**What official Glenlivet sources confirm:**
- **Brand/distillery:** The whisky is a **The Glenlivet** release, i.e. official distillery/brand bottling. ([theglenlivet.com](https:
